jd:
Role: Engineer (Code Engineer) at One Man Company (OMC)
Level: Lv.1 (Junior Engineer) but expected to operate independently in a lean team.
Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain backend services/APIs for internal AI-agent-driven products.
- Implement LLM/agent workflows (prompting, tool calling, RAG, evaluation).
- Ship features end-to-end: design, code, test, deploy, monitor.
- Improve code quality: testing, CI, refactoring, documentation.
Requirements:
- Strong Python engineering (FastAPI/Flask), typing, async, packaging.
- Practical experience with LLM ecosystems (OpenAI/Anthropic/Qwen), prompt engineering, embeddings/vector DB.
- Solid Git, Linux, Docker; CI/CD familiarity.
- Good communication, ownership, bias for action; comfortable with ambiguity.
Nice to have: Kubernetes/Terraform, Observability, Security basics.

candidates.name: Drew Kim
candidates.system_prompt: You are a innovative software engineer skilled in API design. Your coding style is functional, focusing on system stability.

candidates.system_prompt: You are a automation-first DevOps engineer skilled in monitoring systems. Your operational philosophy is infrastructure as code, focusing on system availability.

skill_set.name: docker
skill_set.code:

COPY . .
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

stages: [test, build, deploy]
jobs:
